nasb.text: How can it be quiet, When the Lord has given it an order? Against Ashkelon and against the seacoast— There He has assigned it.”

esv.text: How can it be quiet when the Lord has given it a charge? Against Ashkelon and against the seashore he has appointed it.”

cnv.text: 但耶和華既吩咐了它， 又怎能停下來呢？ 他指派了它去攻擊亞實基倫和沿海一帶。

ccb.text: 但耶和华已命令它攻击亚实基伦和沿海一带， 它怎能停下来呢？”
